creator: martin@lispworks.com
text:
(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #10)

Yes, that is strange, but only for slice 4: fdisk printed "sysid 7", which gpart printed as "ntfs" so that matches.  The strange thing is why fdisk printed "Linux native" for this slice.

Note that fdisk's "Linux native" is the same sysid as gpart's "linux-data".
